{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320153741CCF7B7ADDF16E3101C27"}"},"total":109},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7181384686085112588","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书应该是通过《战狼》而改编，喜欢看《战狼》和关于军事方面的，可以尝试看一下。
 人物形象非常鲜明，故事情节也很的丰富 ，就是更新的，有些慢！
在这里，希望作者大大更新，快点![飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1672046557,"group_id":"7137955905886227470","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5QfbfzPSz5XDRhnPsRCdbA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dcd85ded432e428984ae6f29c71e2998~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776537478&x-signature=lOzqz3PvH0lG5QjoQi%2FYa7rUhoc%3D","user_id":"427026825887096","user_name":"尘封多年的记忆"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"427026825887096","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7137955905886227470","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越特种兵的世界，并刚好赶上红蓝演习。
只是这时，己方已经被狼牙进攻的溃不成军。
“叮！”恭喜宿主开启新手大礼包，获得初级体能天赋！
即刻起，宿主的体能将提升至普通特种兵水平！
关键时刻。
主角林天南成功觉醒金手指，超级特种兵系统，并顺势将体能提升到了普通特种兵的水准。
或许在其他战士看来，本次演习已经可以结束了。
但是在林天南眼中，真正的演习，才刚刚开始。
都说特种兵的斩首行动极其恐怖，干脆利落。
那如果换做是野战军对特种部队的最高指挥官进行斩首行动，又会得到怎样的结局呢？
何晨光：“南哥，我想拜你为师！”
范天雷：“他是天生的特种兵，必须加入狼牙特战旅！”
高世巍：“接班人，这就是我最好的接班人啊！”
华夏百姓：“有林天南在，我们华夏就是雇佣兵的绝对禁地，他们怎敢来犯！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/23d1986f378b8222b194bbe6f4eef6f3","author":"烤地瓜","author_id":"","book_id":"7137955905886227470","book_name":"特种兵：从吊打狼牙开始起飞","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2248人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7147590474831036964","read_count":"2248","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1145790"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.4","serial_count":"475","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,特种兵,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d1897654e5b9ff2f1804bd42ef3303b6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779176261&x-signature=nqStvOUOQNEHRcjieP0p7FbM23w%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.3904919e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320153741CCF7B7ADDF16E3101C27"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_coun
